title: Extended Sweet Spot
description: Long duration sweet spot for advanced riders
purpose: Long duration sweet spot for advanced riders

intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0 minutes of work done. 70 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/2. 25:00 at 94%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/2. 90-94% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 94% for 25:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/2. 25:00 at 94%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 25:00 at 94%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 10:00. Then 35min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 10:00 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 35 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 10:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 2/2. 56% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 94% × 25:00. Then 10min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 25:00 at 94%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 94% for 25:00. Then 10min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 94% × 25:00. Seated, 75-85 rpm. Finish what you started.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 87% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 87% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 87% through. This is your workout. Own it. 60% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 87% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
